summary: Frontend UI/Routing fixes verified - All 6 test cases PASSED. Auto-Mix card correctly links to /auto-mixer, Tournament page renders (not blank), Leaderboard has dark theme with sky blue accents, Kernel of Wow holder is Ramzes (not Anonymous).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend routing fixes verified: (1) /auto-mixer route renders AutoMixerSubscription with 30 DOGE, 6h window, 2/hr config, (2) /tournament route renders Tournament page with bracket structure, (3) /leaderboard has dark navy bg (#0a0f1a), sky blue accents, Season 1 countdown, (4) Auto-Mix card links to /auto-mixer (not /settings), (5) Tournament card links to /tournament, (6) Kernel of Wow holder is 'Ramzes' (not Anonymous).

fix_1_auto_mixer_route.details: Auto-Mix card correctly links to /auto-mixer. Page shows 30 DOGE monthly fee, 6h window, 2/hr auto-mixes.

fix_2_tournament_route.details: Tournament page renders with Treat Masters Champions League header, tournament bracket (Quarterfinals, Semifinals, Grand Final), and qualified scientists section.

fix_3_leaderboard_redesign.details: Leaderboard has dark navy background (rgb 10,15,26), sky blue accents, Season 1 countdown, 20M $LAB total rewards, 3D card effects, Top 50 VIP Scientists list.

fix_4_auto_mix_card_link.details: Auto-Mix FeatureCard href='/auto-mixer' confirmed via data-testid='feature-auto-mixer'

fix_5_tournament_card_link.details: Tournament FeatureCard href='/tournament' confirmed via data-testid='feature-tournament'

fix_6_kernel_of_wow_holder.details: /api/special-ingredient/current returns 'Ramzes' as holder (not Anonymous). Player address: 0x664186B0b57CAcb5359039db35F632b91a33ffFa
